parameters.jsCode:
const ids = $('Compute Accountability Metrics').first().json.overdue_task_ids || [];
return ids.map(id => ({ json: { id: id } }));

parameters.content:
## DD-4 Task Accountability Tracker
Runs daily at 09:00. IMPORTANT: set this workflow timezone to Asia/Kolkata in Workflow Settings (the SDK cannot set it programmatically).

Fetches all team_tasks, computes per-member metrics (bd_member_email = task_owner_email, total, completed, completion_rate, overdue_count, avg_completion_time_days), marks overdue tasks (due_date in the past and status not Done) as Overdue, and writes ONE audit_logs row with action accountability_daily_check containing overdue_count + metrics.

Tester mode: audit log only - NO emails, NO notification nodes.
Manual step: repoint Supabase credential dsZvYaB5av1RwbxL to https://fwzdhmobfcwsspobrvdl.supabase.co (service_role key).
